_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the outputs of course of action and exercise analysis.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of common analytical frameworks, including cohort analysis, funnel analysis, segmentation, time series analysis, and A/B test result interpretation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-002 (RM, cosine: 0.375), OP-K-004 (OP, cosine: 0.363).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.462). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [action, course, exercise, outputs] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, b, cohort, common, frameworks, funnel] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.900, R=0.866). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:1.2%, N:76.0%, C:22.8%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of the outputs of course of action and exercise analysis." vs "Knowledge of common analytical frameworks, including cohort analysis, funnel ana" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.408 < STS 0.462 (gap -0.054). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [action, course, exercise] and [analytical, b, cohort] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.4%. Shared tokens: [analysis, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [action, course, exercise, outputs]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, b, cohort, common, frameworks, funnel].
